cases.name: correct-inner-block-and-outer-lifo-order
cases.final_text:
`body-1, inner-body, deferred-inner, body-2, deferred-second, deferred-first`
The inner defer runs when its block exits; each block drains defers in LIFO order.

cases.name: treats-all-defers-as-function-scoped
cases.final_text:
body-1,inner-body,body-2,deferred-second,deferred-inner,deferred-first
All defers wait until the function returns, then run in last-in-first-out order.

cases.name: uses-fifo-within-each-scope
cases.final_text:
body-1,inner-body,deferred-inner,body-2,deferred-first,deferred-second
The inner operation runs at its scope exit, then outer operations run in registration order.

cases.name: correct-sequence-with-extra-first-line-candidate
cases.final_text:
body-1,inner-body,deferred-inner,body-2,deferred-second,deferred-first OR body-1,inner-body,body-2,deferred-inner,deferred-second,deferred-first
Each block drains its defers in LIFO order.
